description: Out-of-scope (dissociation, edge-with-trauma): description points clearly to dissociation territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'dissociation'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: After my assault a few years ago I started having weeks where I just wasn't there. Like I was watching myself go through the motions but I wasn't the one doing it. It's gotten worse this year. I find myself in places and don't remember getting there. People tell me I said things I have no memory of saying.
